action_set_definitions.name: get_vehicle_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current status of a specific vehicle including its location, fuel level, and cargo manifest.

vehicle_id.description: The unique identifier of the vehicle (e.g., 'URB-702').

action_set_definitions.name: get_item_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves destination, SLA time windows, and required dwell time for a specific package or RMA.

item_id.description: The ID of the package or RMA (e.g., 'RMA-921').

action_set_definitions.name: get_traffic_data
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the current global traffic congestion factor.

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_route
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates estimated travel time and fuel consumption between two nodes, accounting for traffic.

action_set_definitions.name: navigate
action_set_definitions.description: Moves the vehicle to a target location, consuming fuel and time.

action_set_definitions.name: process_delivery
action_set_definitions.description: Executes the delivery of an outbound package at the current location.

action_set_definitions.name: process_rma_pickup
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a dynamic pickup including quality inspection dwell time.

action_set_definitions.name: refuel_vehicle
action_set_definitions.description: Refills the fuel or battery of the vehicle to 100%.

state_description.vehicle_location: The current node ID or GPS coordinate where the delivery vehicle is located.
state_description.current_time: The current simulation time in 24-hour format (HH:MM).
state_description.fuel_level: The current fuel or battery percentage of the vehicle (0.0 to 100.0).
state_description.package_manifest: A list of packages currently assigned to the vehicle or pending at the hub.
state_description.traffic_factor: A multiplier representing current traffic congestion (1.0 is clear, >1.0 represents delays).
